name: input-field
title: InputField
description: A rounded glass text input on the Onda Surface, with an optional label above and a placeholder. With `typed` on, the value types itself in (via useTextReveal) behind a blinking caret, with an accent focus ring — all frame-driven and deterministic.
pickWhen: a form field in a UI demo — login, signup, AI prompt box. Set `typed` to show the user filling it in.
